item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I was hoping to see some negative/neutral discussion of this scip, because I can't see why its rating would be so low. I guess there's just not enough here for some folks? The only issue I found in the article was here:

Exhuming her body showed that its stomach had been stuffed with approximately 150 meters of Super 8mm footage of SCP-3170; portions of the film had been replaced with corneal tissue matching that of SCP-3170.

It wasn't entirely clear to me why they'd exhume and inspect her body. Other than that, I think this is well-written, and probably just needed more content to hook people in and get us to care more about the anomalous actress.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I thought I was only acting
But I felt exactly like it was all for real
I sure didn't know it hurt so bad
That no rehearsal could show you how to feel inside...

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"Yuliana!
You should have been immortal
That's all Xio wanted
Not much to ask for…"

Well put together, clear without being simplistic, like a drawing with no unnecessary lines. Leaves me wanting just a little more in a good way.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Short and sweet! This would benefit as well from a picture, but otherwise, A+.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
SCP-3170's anomalous property activates whenever she dies.

This is a gorgeous sentence in a gorgeous skip. +1.

item.title: truth at 24 frames per second
item.content:encoded:
Thanks to minmin, Randomini, Hippo and SpectralDragon (as well as many other people in chat.)

Still trawling my family's photo collection for a good picture to use here. Will update if I find one.
